other_observers: Gary Matthews, Eric DeFonso, Dave Leatherman, Maggie Boswell, Joyce Takamine, Sandy Arnesen, Scott Rashid; Bob Chase on 05/05/09
description: Small warbler sized bird. Gray upperparts with slight black streaking. White underparts with yellow chin, throat, and breast. Yellow supercilium with white at rear. Yellow crescent under eye, black lores. Black streaking along flanks, two white wing-bars, and extensive white on tail.Behaviors: Most of the time singing from pine tree.Call: As described in Nat. Geo., "rapid, accelerating trill."Plumage: adult
